headline: Communardo strengthens European presence with expansion into the Benelux region
summary: Acquisition of Dutch Atlassian Platinum partner Prepend, expanding Communardo's European footprint.

headline: Communardo scales as an Atlassian & Microsoft platform across Europe
summary: Coverage of Communardo's growth as Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner and Marketplace vendor.

headline: Communardo acquires Ambientia's Atlassian business in Finland
summary: Communardo acquired Ambientia's Atlassian business, expanding its presence into Finland as part of its Nordic growth strategy.

headline: Communardo acquires Austrian Atlassian Platinum Partner ByteSource
summary: Communardo acquired ByteSource, Austria's leading Atlassian Platinum Partner and first AWS Premier Tier Partner, strengthening its DACH-region and cloud/DevOps capabilities.

headline: Communardo Group acquires Copenhagen-based Aety, scaling Danish presence past 480 employees
summary: Communardo acquired Danish Atlassian consultancy Aety, growing the group to more than 480 employees and building a full delivery organization in Denmark.

headline: Florence Heinen appointed VP Operations Atlassian Professional Services
summary: Communardo created a new group-level leadership role, naming Florence Heinen VP Operations for Atlassian Professional Services effective June 1, 2026.

headline: Communardo Experts launches as a joint venture with Spirit Experts in Morocco
summary: Communardo formed a joint venture, Communardo Experts GmbH, with Spirit Experts to build an Atlassian delivery hub in Casablanca, extending into the MENA region.

headline: Communardo Group GmbH acquires Computas Opus, becoming Atlassian market leader in Norway
summary: Communardo acquired Norwegian Atlassian Platinum Partner Computas Opus, establishing itself as the market leader in Norway's Atlassian ecosystem.

headline: celix joins the Communardo Group
summary: Communardo acquired Austrian Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner celix Solutions GmbH, strengthening its market leadership in the DACH region.

headline: Partnership with Mibex strengthens software portfolio
summary: Communardo acquired Swiss Atlassian Gold Marketplace Partner Mibex Software, adding a DevOps-focused app portfolio serving over 2,700 customers.

headline: Communardo enters Nordic market with acquisition of Stretch Addera in Sweden
summary: Communardo acquired Swedish Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner Stretch Addera, entering the Nordic market and reinforcing its position as a pan-European Atlassian leader.

headline: Communardo expands Industry Advisory Board with Seidensticker and Kranebitter
summary: Communardo added Dr. Franz-Josef Seidensticker as Chairman and Christian Kranebitter to its Industry Advisory Board to support market expansion and process professionalization.

headline: Communardo partners with Bregal Unternehmerkapital to drive growth strategy and European expansion
summary: Bregal Unternehmerkapital funds invested in Communardo Holding GmbH to accelerate its customer-centric growth strategy, European expansion, and service/software portfolio extension.

headline: Anje Hickey appointed CEO for Atlassian Professional Services in Europe
summary: Communardo named Anje Hickey, former CEO of Fellowmind Germany and 12-year Microsoft veteran, as CEO of its Atlassian Professional Services business across Europe effective January 1, 2026.

headline: Communardo Products rebrands as Elevatic unifying Marketplace app portfolio
summary: Communardo Products rebranded as Elevatic, consolidating the former Communardo Products, bitvoodoo, and Mibex brands into one independent Atlassian Marketplace vendor.
